theme_archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) adapted for Minimalist Dark Journal
design_philosophy: Premium, calm, and highly focused. The app acts as an anti-idea-jumping sanctuary. Friction is intentionally introduced to prevent goal-switching. We avoid gamified, hyper-stimulating interfaces in favor of a reflective, high-quality journal aesthetic.

onboarding.description: 6-step wizard. Keep it highly focused. One question per screen. Generous vertical spacing. Fade-in animations between steps.

home_active_focus.description: The active focus card should take up the majority of the screen. Display the streak prominently using the 'streak_number' typography. Use a subtle amber glow behind the card to signify its importance.

friction_gate.description: When adding a new idea while one is active, present a weighty, full-screen modal (backgroundColor: rgba(15,15,15,0.95)). Use 'Playfair Display' for a serious, reflective warning title. Require a deliberate action (like a long-press or a slide-to-confirm) to abandon the current goal, heavily nudging them to the 'Park Idea' button instead.

parking_lot.description: A list of parked ideas. Use swipe-to-delete (discard) and swipe-to-promote (make active). Cards here should have lower opacity borders to feel 'waiting' rather than 'active'.

admin_dashboard.description: Hidden route triggered by long-press and PIN (2847). Uses the blue accent (#185FA5) instead of amber to distinctively separate the context from the user-facing app.

splash_background.description: Minimalist premium dark charcoal and amber abstract gradient texture, subtle grain. Use as the splash screen background or behind the onboarding flow.

focus_icon_3d.description: 3D glowing amber spark in dark glass sphere. Use on the Home screen or Check-in modal to celebrate focus.

parking_icon_3d.description: 3D vault/meter icon. Use in the Parking Lot empty state or as the header image for the Parking Lot screen.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly use React Native's `StyleSheet.create()` for all styling. DO NOT use Tailwind CSS or NativeWind.
Ensure `expo-font` is configured to load 'Playfair Display' and 'Manrope'. Use fallback system fonts conditionally while loading.
Maintain the #0F0F0F deep dark background across all main screens. Avoid pure black to reduce eye strain.
Implement the UI with a 'premium journal' aesthetic: ample whitespace (padding: 24), subtle 1px borders (rgba(255,255,255,0.05)), and no harsh drop shadows.

All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs) MUST include a `testID` attribute (React Native equivalent of data-testid) formatted as kebab-case, role-based names (e.g., `testID="login-submit-button"`).
For the 7-day momentum graph and progress calendar heatmap, use a custom SVG or a charting library, styling it with the amber accent (#BA7517) and dark surface (#1A1A1A).
The Friction Gate must feel deliberate. Implement a slight delay or a complex gesture (like hold-to-confirm) if the user insists on abandoning their current goal.
Use standard React Native `Modal` or a bottom sheet library for the Check-in and Friction Gate interactions, styling the overlay with rgba(15, 15, 15, 0.85).
